case_title: LEE, KEVIN VS CROSETTI, PAUL CPCU GCA BRANCH CLAIMS MANAGER CAMP et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DEBORAH A. WILLIAMS AS TO PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE DECLARATION OF KEVIN LEE IN SUPPORT OF SAID MOTION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEE, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT CROSETTI, PAUL CPCU GCA BRANCH CLAIMS MANAGER CAMP BELL BRANCH CLAIMS OFFICE MID-CENTURY INSURANCE CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CROSETTI, PAUL CPCU GCA BRANCH CLAIMS MANAGER CAMP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, KEVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CROSETTI, PAUL CPCU GCA BRANCH CLAIMS MANAGER CAMP BELL BRANCH CLAIMS OFFICE MID-CENTURY INSURANCE CO PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
